content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Food Service Specialties: Back Office support Anywhere in the World California Design Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4223/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> worldwide <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.brfood.us">http://www.brfood.us</a> </p> <p><a href="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1H2UFgxxF1DbBJvoYJFNCnyGY_WsRKqvU/edit?gid=1320818024#gid=1320818024">https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1H2UFgxxF1DbBJvoYJFNCnyGY_WsRKqvU/edit?gid=1320818024#gid=1320818024</a></p> <p># Remote Contractor — Accounting &amp; Operations Assistant</p> <p>**B&amp;R Food Services Inc.** — Wholesale meat and restaurant supply distributor, Los Angeles, CA (U.S.-based company, fully remote position)</p> <p>## About the Role</p> <p>We're looking for organized, reliable multitaskers with strong communication skills to join our remote operations team. You'll support daily back-office workflows for a fast-moving food distribution business.</p> <p>## Requirements</p> <p>- **English fluency** — excellent written and verbal communication<br>- **Microsoft Excel** — intermediate level or above<br>- **Equipment (required):**<br>&nbsp; - Business-class laptop or desktop: Intel Core i7 / AMD Ryzen 7 (recent generation), 32GB RAM minimum, 1TB NVMe SSD<br>&nbsp; - Dual monitors<br>&nbsp; - Wired Ethernet or strong network connection — must support all-day Zoom calls and remote hosted environments simultaneously</p> <p>## Available Shifts (Pacific Time)</p> <p>| Shift | Hours | Days |<br>|---|---|---|<br>| Morning | 6:00 AM – 3:00 PM | Monday–Saturday |<br>| Evening | 4:00 PM – 1:00 AM | Sunday–Friday |<br>| Overnight | 1:00 AM – 9:00 AM | Monday–Saturday |</p> <p>## Compensation</p> <p>- **Training period (30 days):** $1,200<br>- **Independent worker:** $1,500/month<br>- **Growth:** Take ownership of a task area and earn a **15% base salary increase per task**, such as:<br>&nbsp; - Customer/vendor aging<br>&nbsp; - Inventory<br>&nbsp; - Purchase orders<br>&nbsp; - Price updates</p> <p>## How to Apply</p> <p>Complete the short assessment below. **Only candidates who submit the completed assessment will be reviewed.**</p> <p>**The assessment:** The workbook contains two sheets — *Sheet 1: Purchase Order* and *Sheet 2: Vendor Bill*. Analyze the differences between the two documents to the best of your knowledge and experience.</p> <p>**Download:** [Assessment file](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1H2UFgxxF1DbBJvoYJFNCnyGY_WsRKqvU/edit?usp=drivesdk&amp;ouid=109079207465878460109&amp;rtpof=true&amp;sd=true)</p> <p>**Rules:**<br>1. Do not delete or modify the original sheets — all sheets must be preserved for audit<br>2. Do not convert formulas to values — the file must remain fully auditable<br>3. Show all your logic inside the Excel file — no explanations in the email</p> <p>**Submit:**<br>- Email your completed workbook (.xlsx) to: **assessments.brfoodus@gmail.com**<br>- Subject line: **Assessment**<br>- Attach the Excel file only — no text in the email body</p> <p>---</p> <p>Good luck — we look forward to seeing your work.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/food-service-specialties-back-office-support">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/food-service-specialties-back-office-support</a></p> Tue, 07 Jul 2026 01:56:47 +0000 Thu, 06 Aug 2026 01:56:47 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/food-service-specialties-back-office-support https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/food-service-specialties-back-office-support True Publicity: Undergrad Student - Remote, Part time, flexible hours - Assistant and Content Manager Anywhere in the World Wyoming Virtual Assistant All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5744/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Boulder, Colorado <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://truepublicity.com">https://truepublicity.com</a> </p> <p>Hey guys.</p> <p> This is the perfect gig for an undergrad student </p> <ul> <li>Fully remote</li> <li>Flexible hours</li> <li>Part time - (Won't take away from your studies)</li> <li>Paid training included</li> <li>Good pay</li> </ul> <p>You'll be doing some basic virtual assistant computer work, some Wordpress / content management but it's easy to do, and training and help will be available.</p> <p>Please fill in the application form at <a href="https://tally.so/r/1A5E2l">https://tally.so/r/1A5E2l</a>&nbsp;</p> <p>Looking forward to hearing from you!</p> <p>Kind regards</p> <p>David</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager</a></p> Mon, 06 Jul 2026 10:45:59 +0000 Wed, 05 Aug 2026 10:45:59 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/true-publicity-undergrad-student-remote-part-time-flexible-hours-assistant-and-content-manager Creative Force: SaaS Product Support Jedi – Remote, EMEA Anywhere in the World Berkshire SaaS Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0074/5226/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Creative Force <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.creativeforce.team/">https://www.creativeforce.team/</a> </p> <p>We’re on the hunt for a sharp, self-driven SaaS pro who’s as comfortable navigating staging environments as they are navigating human conversations.</p> <p>Our EMEA client base is growing fast and we need someone who can keep up. Our software isn’t your average plug-and-play; it has a steep learning curve so you’ll need to be technically savvy while also being the kind of person clients genuinely enjoy talking to. If you’ve got SaaS in your DNA, thrive in async/remote environments, and can juggle multiple threads without breaking a sweat — keep reading.</p> <h2>The role</h2> <p>You’ll join a lean, high-performing global support team working across two SaaS products, Award Force and Good Grants. Day to day you’ll be communicating with colleagues and clients across countries, cultures, and time zones.</p> <p>Support happens across email tickets, phone, and 1-1 Zoom calls. Once you’ve leveled up on product knowledge, you’ll run onboarding sessions and client meetings covering issue resolution, best practices, and product adoption.</p> <p>You’ll also
